title: 4 Pack Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids for Bathroom, Cute Qtip Holder, Black Bathroom Accessories Set, Small Bathroom Canisters with Lids for Q-Tips, Cotton Swabs, Black Bathroom Decor
description:
About this item
CUTE BATHROOM DECOR: Small and cute glass apothecary jars will add fun and beauty to your bathroom. Whether you place it on your bathroom countertop or bathroom shelf, it will add to the ambiance of rustic farmhouse decor. It's an indispensable accent to your bathroom decor
ESSENTIAL BATHROOM ACCESSORIES SET: Let's see what you'll get, 4 pack quality glass apothecary jars with lids, 6 pcs black labels with pre-printed words (Cotton Balls, Cotton Swabs, Cotton Pads, Floss Picks, Bath Salty, Hair Accessory) and 6 pcs white labels. For your bathroom organizer and storage, this will be an important addition. Each jar measures 2.8" x 2.8" x 4.7" (L x W x H)
COMPACT BATHROOM CONTAINNERS: Goramio apothecary jars are made of superior-quality solid glass, sturdy and beautiful. Compared to cheap plastic, glass q-tip holders are more sturdy and upscale. Good for storing small things such as cotton balls, cotton swabs, cotton rounds, floss picks, tampons, bath salts, hair ties, makeup brushes, beauty eggs, face brushes, crayons, candy, and paper clips, etc
ONE-HANDED USE: The 8 oz apothecary jar has a non-threaded lid. No tightening is required. This allows you to remove the contents of the jar with one hand, making it very easy to use. Every use will be quick and enjoyable
IDEAL GIFT: Such cute and practical bathroom canisters are destined to be a big hit. Good for birthday gifts, Thanksgiving gifts, Christmas gifts and New Year's gifts for friends and family. Everyone will be happy to receive the cute glass jars
reviews_5s: This product is great in quality and has a good amount of storage capacity. The functionality of this product is good where you can fit a good amount of whatever product in the jars and it’s easy to open. The organization adds the perfect touch to my bathroom and I love the look. I highly recommend this product.These are small, but cute. They are the perfect size for my bathroom and to hold the supplies on the labels. I like that this came with some pre-printed labels since I don't have the nicest handwriting.I love these little jars they fit the floss picks perfectly in them. I also think that they’re built very sturdy because one of them fell and it did not break so that’s a plus! I do wish that they came with more labels of names since I would like to continue matching the labels that are black to any additional jars I may buy in the future.They are cute, comes with stickers with writings on them or blank ones. I have mine in between my sinks so they are used daily. Would purchase again if need be.These apothecary jars are perfect for the countertop in our guest bathroom. It keeps the supplies neat and dust-free. Lids simply set on top making for easy access. Came packaged well to protect during shipping.Perfect size for guest bathrooms. Tips, floss sticks fit perfectI am having my bathroom remodeled with matte black hardware. I thought these would complement the room given the matte black covers. They were very well packaged and the labels to put on the jars were a nice touch. I liked them so much that I ordered a second set. Great product for the money.Great addition in my restroom. These are a perfect size and fit plenty in them.I bought these for my vanity. It’s perfect for a-tips, cotton rounds, hair ties and many more!Súper elegante para cualquier baño y lo supe recomiendo
reviews_1s: El frasco es de un vidrio muy grueso y pesado, la tapa no tiene rosca, por lo que es imposible de ajustarlo al cerrar. La tapa solo se puede sobreponer al frasco, pero en realidad no hace el trabajo de cerrar y contener, DEMASIADO CARO para un producto que no cumple su mínima función. Me arrepiento te haberlo compradoJar and top do not screw together, useless.Website should a pretty rose gold pink top. When item was received, extremely disappointed in the baby pink tops. Returned as website is off with color description. Wasn’t our cup of tea.
